archived_trends.name: Cross-Chain Liquidity Solutions
archived_trends.summary: Growing demand for interoperability and native asset swaps is driving the development of cross-chain liquidity solutions like THORChain and Symbiosis API.
archived_trends.evidence: THORChain focusing on native asset swaps; Symbiosis API enabling cross-chain swaps; seamless access to liquidity sources.

archived_trends.name: Ethereum Interoperability & Fragmentation
archived_trends.summary: Efforts to address fragmentation within the Ethereum ecosystem and improve interoperability between chains and wallets.
archived_trends.evidence: Focus on building better interop solutions; addressing UX and developer platform fragmentation; clearer vision for L1/L2 relationship.

archived_trends.name: Ethereum Value Capture Shift
archived_trends.summary: Ethereum's value capture model is evolving from gas fee burning to security settlement services through staking and restaking.
archived_trends.evidence: ETH's value capture model moves from gas fee burning to security settlement services, relying on staking and restaking yields.

archived_trends.name: Institutional Bitcoin Adoption
archived_trends.summary: Increasing institutional investment in Bitcoin driven by diversification, long-term growth prospects, and regulatory clarity. ETF inflows are a key indicator, and whale activity is becoming less impactful.
archived_trends.evidence: Bank-backed bitcoin ETFs accelerating adoption; $58 billion cumulative net flows into US spot Bitcoin ETFs; 2,000+ US advisory firms allocating to crypto ETFs; institutions viewing BTC as a legitimate asset; ETF mirroring of market price; continuous buying/selling maintaining liquidity.

archived_trends.name: Ethereum Fundamentals & Transition to PoS
archived_trends.summary: Ethereum continues to solidify its position as a foundational blockchain, with the successful transition to Proof-of-Stake (PoS) significantly reducing energy consumption and enhancing security.
archived_trends.evidence: Ethereum's PoS transition cut energy usage by over 99%; continued development of smart contract functionality; second largest market capitalization.
